title: Panoramic Fix
description: Removes harsh borders when taking a panorama screenshot using the debug feature added in 25w37a
body: # Panoramic fix Removes borders when taking a panoramic screenshot with the debug feature in 25w37a caused by fog changing based on rotation ## Examples Screenshot taken with the mod Screenshot taken in vanilla ## Using the mod 1. Make sure the `PANORAMA_SCREENSHOT` debug property is enabled 2. Take a panorama screenshot with Ctrl+F2 or Cmd+F2 3. Enjoy your perfect, seamless panorama screenshot
